title: Tandoor Satay Chicken
description: Grilled chicken satay marinated in a blend of spices and yogurt, served with a side of tangy peanut sauce.
instructions: In a blender, combine yogurt, coconut milk, tandoor spice mix, garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, and salt.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve with peanut sauce and garnish with peanuts.
